description_long: This is a bright orange Coast Guard helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent main rotor mounted on top. The helicopter features a long, narrow tail boom ending in a tail rotor enclosed within a protective shroud. The cockpit is equipped with large, angular windows providing wide visibility, and the body displays white diagonal striping and Coast Guard insignia. The landing gear consists of sturdy skids attached to the underside, designed for stability on various surfaces. The main rotor has four long, black blades, and the tail rotor has multiple blades arranged in a circular pattern. The helicopter's exterior is primarily metal with some composite materials, and it is marked with the registration number '1804' on the tail.
description: A bright orange Coast Guard helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, enclosed tail rotor, large cockpit windows, and white striping. It features landing skids and the registration number '1804' on the tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helicopter's nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Coast Guard markings, white diagonal stripe, landing skids, and the full length of the tail boom with the tail rotor visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, enclosed tail rotor, and the symmetry of the helicopter's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features as view 1, with clear visibility of the cockpit, rotor, and landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades, black in color, with a slight taper towards the tips and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Enclosed tail rotor with multiple short blades arranged in a circular pattern, white with a black center, protected by a shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular landing skids made of metal, painted orange, with crossbars for structural support and stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five large, angular cockpit windows with black framing, slightly tinted, wrapping around the front and sides for wide visibility.
